projects.name: Sergio Lares (212129)
projects.completed_text: Big productivity day — 11 tasks completed. Milagros knocked out cabinets installation and inspection, countertop measurements/scheduling/rescheduling, plus all procurement steps for plumbing (SOW, vendors, WO) and appliances (SOW, vendors, WO).
projects.problems_text: Two electrical tasks still overdue: REQUEST CITY INSPECTION (4d) and CITY INSPECTION (3d). Both on Milagros — the inspection can't happen until the request goes through.
projects.risk_text: Pre-delivery walkthrough due Mar 31, blocked by scheduling. Plumbing and electrical trim both due Apr 1, each waiting on schedule confirmation. Project delivery target Apr 8 — tight but doable if the current momentum continues.

projects.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
projects.completed_text: Pre Pour inspection completed today by Angel Pacheco. This was overdue since yesterday — resolved quickly.
projects.problems_text: No overdue tasks remaining. Concrete pour pushed to Mar 30 (+3d) and PM INSPECTION | FOUNDATION pushed to Mar 31 (+4d) — last-minute schedule changes detected today.
projects.risk_text: Foundation cure cascaded to Apr 7, framing to Apr 10, framing inspection to Apr 13. The 3-day pour delay rippled through the whole chain. Exterior doors purchase also pushed +2d to Apr 11.

projects.name: Gaurav Bansal (KU-1225Avondale)
projects.completed_text: No completions today. This project has been stalled all week.
projects.problems_text: 7 overdue tasks — the most of any project. CALL 811 is now 7 days late with no one assigned. Kick-off meeting, architectural plans, 811 inspection, dig scheduling, and materials all 1-2 days late. Almost nothing has an assignee.
projects.risk_text: DIG FOUNDATION AND PLUMBING DITCHES due tomorrow but blocked by the overdue scheduling task, and unassigned. SCHEDULE FORM BOARD also due tomorrow, unassigned. This project cannot move forward until someone takes ownership.

projects.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
projects.problems_text: 3 framing tasks overdue by 1 day: ERECT METAL FRAMING & COLUMNS and INTERIOR FRAMING (both unassigned), plus CONFIRM SCHEDULE (Jeff). No vendors assigned to execute the framing work.
projects.risk_text: FRAMING: CITY INSPECTION due tomorrow with no one assigned. If framing isn't confirmed done, inspection can't proceed.

projects.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
projects.problems_text: BRICKS: PURCHASE MATERIAL is 1 day late (Marcio, Romina, Reynaldo assigned). Interior trim and doors blocked by schedule confirmation — but was pulled forward 7 days to Apr 3, a proactive move.
projects.risk_text: Brick purchase needs to close out. Otherwise the schedule adjustments today were positive — trim installation moved earlier.

projects.name: CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522)
projects.problems_text: 8 blocked tasks in the roofing chain. The entire sequence from SOW → takeoff → pricing → quote → approval → scheduling → purchasing → delivery → install is jammed. Several tasks due today (APPROVE WO, SUBMIT QUOTE) are blocked by predecessors.
projects.risk_text: 5 tasks due today or tomorrow, all blocked. SECURE PRICING due tomorrow is unassigned. If the SOW and takeoff don't get done ASAP, the roofing install (Apr 1) is at serious risk.

projects.name: Ginger Brown
projects.problems_text: Plumbing trim and its inspection are blocked — waiting on plumber scheduling. Both due mid-April so not urgent yet.
projects.risk_text: EXTERIOR PAINT: PAINT EXTERIOR due tomorrow. Assigned to Milagros — needs to happen on schedule.

projects.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
projects.completed_text: 2 tasks completed: framing takeoff and cedar wood takeoff (Sunroom), both by Angel Pacheco and Romina Rey.
projects.problems_text: No overdue tasks. Foundation cure and framing blocked by concrete pour chain — foundation cure cascaded +2d to Apr 10 from a schedule change.
projects.risk_text: Framing now Apr 16. Window delivery confirmation needed before doors/windows can install (Apr 13). On track but the pour delay compressed the margin.

projects.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
projects.problems_text: 11 blocked tasks — entire foundation sequence (dig, form board, plumbing, electrical, pour) is blocked because scheduling tasks haven't been started. Nearly everything is unassigned.
projects.risk_text: First execution tasks due Apr 9-10. Still time, but scheduling and vendor assignments need to happen in the next week or this project will start going overdue.
